name: Cheese Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients in a food processor just until a ball of dough forms.
2. Shape the dough into a log that is 1 1/2 inches thick on a floured board.
3. Refrigerate for at least one hour.
4. Preheat oven to 350°F.
5. Remove from refrigerator and slice into 1/4 inch thick slices. If desired, place a pecan half or pecan quarter in the center of each biscuit.
6. Bake approximately 12 minutes, watching carefully. They will continue to brown while cooling and taste better if they are not overdone.
7. These keep well in tightly covered containers. The logs of dough may also be frozen until ready to use. Thaw the log and slice into biscuits.
